description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich brown finish and a distinctive semi-circular front. The cabinet features three central drawers, each with a round knob, flanked on both sides by two open, curved shelves. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are solid wood, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The legs are short and sturdy, providing stable support for the entire structure.
description: A brown wooden cabinet with three central drawers and open curved shelves on each side, featuring a semi-circular front and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved open shelves and the solid wood construction.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three central drawers with knobs and open shelves on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the curved open shelves and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel and the cabinet's legs.
